text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship returns from her quest for Eden just in
time to make her debut race. But right before the
race starts, what should she see but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A chihuahua through a stick of chikuwa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I send Gold Ship off to the race with an anxious
prayer, wondering if she'll be able to tap into her
full potential.
